string 2:
I'm honing my mind and spirit, glurp. Please do not speak to
me, glurp.

Now that the forest village is safe, I want to liven things
up with a party for everyone!

And for that, we need a band! Nothing gets a party going
like some good music.

Me already make choir. We have many volunteers. But... no
lead vocalist.

I know just the Digimon who would slay with its singing
skills, though! ShogunGekomon!

So I'm looking for someone I can send out to scout
ShogunGekomon for the position.
{next}Which is where I come in?
{next}Someone like who?
{next}But where are you going to find a scout?

I see you catch on fast. I love people who are quick on the
uptake.

Someone like you, obviously! Now get out there and start
talking to ShogunGekomon!

You can't fool me. You're the scout I had in mind, and that
sly look tells me you knew it!
But, Lord Bacchusmon, where ShogunGekomon?

ShogunGekomon hones his mind and spirit before a show. He
will be in the sanctuary.
{next}I'll go take a look.
{next}Are you sure about that?
{end}I'm afraid I can't right now.

If you find anyone distracting ShogunGekomon, get
them away from our star!

If ShogunGekomon isn't there, go find it! I need you to help
me out with this, okay?

No? Of all the unreliable... Listen. I'm not asking for
much, here. Help me out, okay?

ShogunGekomon should be in the sanctuary honing his mind and
spirit. Go bring him here!
{next}I'll go take a look.
{end}I'm afraid I can't right now.

If you find anyone distracting ShogunGekomon, get
them away from our star!

So, you still can't commit? Listen. I'm not asking for much,
here. Help me out, okay?

I, too, shall search for ShogunGekomon. His prowess as a
lead vocalist intrigues me.
{next}I appreciate the help!
{next}You think it's really that good?
{next}No need.

My only concern is for ShogunGekomon. I could not care less
what happens to you humans.

No. I share your doubts. I believe we ought to put
ShogunGekomon's talents to the test.

Protest all you will. I must hear it sing. I go now to the
sanctuary. May we meet again.

Glurp, glurp... Are you certain there are no Titans, glurp?
Oh, what should I do, glurp?!
{next}Come with us.
{next}What's the problem?
{next}Who cares?

I cannot go if Titans are in the sanctuary, glurp! I am a
shogun, after all, glurp.

Is it not obvious, glurp?! If Titans are in the sanctuary,
that is a huge problem, glurp!

Foolish commoner, glurp. A shogun cannot ignore Titans in
the sanctuary, glurp!

Humans, together let us defeat GranKuwagamon and revel in
ShogunGekomon's dulcet tones!
{next}Right. Let's join forces!
{next}You wanna join forces?!
{end}Let's think of another plan.

It is a pleasure to find humans who are so quick to
understand. Down with GranKuwagamon!

If the thought displeases you, then do as you will, but, as
for me, I shall fight!

You lack the will to fight? Very well. Think all you want,
until that desire burns in you.

GranKuwagamon is a mighty foe indeed... Yet I refuse to back
down!

That battle just now... it was magnificent! ShogunGekomon's
singing gave me strength.

Such an amazing voice demands an audience. The enemy is
gone. Will you join our band?

Having fulfilled my duty as a shogun, I am satisfied, glurp.
To the village, glurp!

Now, sing! Sing to your heart's content, ShogunGekomon! The
chorus will back you up!
Gluuuuurp! ♪
Gluuuuurp! ♪
Glurp, glurp, glurp, glurp, gluuuuurp! ♪

Ah! The perfect harmony to bring out the lead vocals! This
is the best! The ultimate band!
It sounds beautiful!
Does that mean my job is done?
Let's sing along!
Truly. THIS is singing! THIS is music!

Yes. Well done! You played an instrumental role in bringing
this band together!

Not a chance! Any other voices would only distract from the
beauty of these vocals!

Now, then, in celebration of your making this possible, I
want you to have this. Take it!

These voices must be preserved... To save this world, let us
go to the promised place!
